channel.title: oddfruit News
channel.description: Development updates, release notes and INR Mate news from oddfruit.

item.title: Preparing INR Mate for iOS 27
item.description: We are temporarily pausing new feature development while we focus on iOS 27 integration and the next generation of iOS 27 features.

item.title: INR Mate v1.2 adds Siri and Shortcuts support
item.description: INR Mate v1.2 is now live, adding Siri and Shortcuts support to make everyday INR and warfarin logging even quicker.

item.title: INR Mate v1.1 adds Comfort Mode, clinic visit PDFs and smoother sync
item.description: The first major update since launch focused on clearer everyday use, appointment-ready exports and smoother device syncing.

item.title: INR Mate launches on the App Store
item.description: INR Mate began as a personal project and has grown into an iPhone, iPad and Apple Watch app for clearer INR and warfarin records.
